history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front (up) is a floor cell, and it is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, which is two steps above and two steps to the right from my current position. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front (up) is a floor cell (.) and is safe. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal. The goal is located two steps to the right and one step ahead from my current position. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front (up) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is located two cells to the right on the same row (col5 and col6). I need to turn clockwise to face right, then I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located two cells directly ahead of me (upward in the local view). The cell immediately in front is a floor tile (.), so it is safe to move forward. I will take a step forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me (above). The cell in that direction is 'O', the goal position. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
